title: The Lonely Reindeer Returns

scene: The Lonely Reindeer Returns. The story turns inward to Chopper’s isolation, his fear of humans, and the painful memories behind his bond with Dr. Hiriluk. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Kuromarimo
dialogue.text: Not yet! We've got to make sure he's dead!

dialogue.speaker: Chess
dialogue.text: Just who the HELL does he think I am...!?
